input.audience: Filipino healthcare workers in their late 20s preparing for Canadian PR. They have already been working as nurses in Manila, are bilingual, balancing clinical shifts with study at home.
input.concept: An aspirational moment showing a candidate calmly finishing the test on her laptop with morning light, conveying control and progress.

copy.headline: Achieve Your CELPIP Goals for Canada
copy.subhead: Prepare for the CELPIP test and demonstrate your English skills for a successful future in Canada. You've got this, and we've got you.

features.title: Focused on Canada
features.desc: CELPIP is specifically designed for those planning to live and work in Canada, ensuring your skills meet local standards.

features.title: Flexible Scheduling
features.desc: Choose a test date that fits your busy schedule. Balance your studies with your clinical shifts.

features.title: Real-Life Scenarios
features.desc: CELPIP uses everyday situations to test your English, making preparation relevant and practical for your career.

testimonials.name: Maria Santos
testimonials.quote: I felt confident taking CELPIP. The test format was clear, and I scored CLB 8!

testimonials.name: John Reyes
testimonials.quote: The practice materials helped me study efficiently around my shifts. I achieved CLB 9!

faqs.a: CELPIP is a Canadian English language proficiency test that assesses your listening, reading, writing, and speaking skills.

faqs.q: How can I prepare for CELPIP?
faqs.a: You can prepare through study guides, practice tests, and online resources tailored to the CELPIP format.

faqs.q: What scores do I need for PR?
faqs.a: Requirements vary. Generally, a CLB score of 7 or higher is recommended for skilled migration.

copy.adTagline: Prepare for CELPIP and take the next step confidently.
